description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10 Docker image, caches the node_modules directory, and runs npm install as a before_script for every job. Define a test job (default test stage) that executes npm run test. Define a doc job in the deploy stage that runs npm run doc, saves the generated doc folder as an artifact, and is limited to tag and trigger pipelines. Define a publish job in the deploy stage that runs npm run build, writes an .npmrc file with the NPM_TOKEN secret (echo '//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}'>.npmrc), and then runs npm publish, also only on tags and triggers. Ensure the cache and before_script apply to all jobs.
